chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.S-35 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 26-05-2025 Mr. Shabbir Ali Bozdar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional P.G for the State. Mr. Saeed Ahmed Wassan, Assistant A.G. **** Azhar Mughal, SSP, Sukkur (respondent No.4) files statement, taken on record and copy whereof is provided to counsel for the petitioner. Counsel for petitioner submits that after filing instant petition, an incident took place, wherein four persons from the respondents’ side have been murdered. SSP, Sukkur submits that such FIR has been registered against the petitioner party. After such statement, counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE Ahmad
